results.summary: File exists. Capability: yes, the script supports provisioning distinct community agents by env-based overrides. The script also records agents in a route registry keyed by slug and defaults both service name and socket path from AGENT_SLUG, so four derived agents plus one manager base agent are supportable when each agent uses a unique handle/slug and therefore unique service/socket values. Caveat from this script alone: per-workspace files under .openclaw are single-path outputs, so multiple agents should be provisioned from distinct workspace roots or with explicit overrides rather than reusing one workspace without differentiation.
